values.content: ={{ (() => { const source = $('Set Input').item.json ?? {}; const templates = $json.templates ?? []; const compactTemplates = templates.map((t) => ({ id: t.id ?? t.templateId ?? t.slug ?? null, job: t.job ?? null, themeVariants: Array.isArray(t.themeVariants) ? t.themeVariants : [], contentDensity: t.contentDensity ?? null, fields: Array.isArray(t.fields) ? t.fields.map((f) => ({ name: f.name ?? f.key ?? f.id ?? null, required: Boolean(f.required) })) : [] })); const goal = String(source.goal ?? ''); return ['You are selecting and filling a social image template.', 'Goal: ' + goal, '', 'Available templates:', JSON.stringify(compactTemplates), '', 'Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact shape:', '{', '  "templateId": "...",', '  "themeVariant": "...",', '  "payload": {', '    "title": "...",', '    "subtitle": "..."', '  }', '}', '', 'Rules:', '- Pick the single best template for the goal.', '- Choose a valid themeVariant from that template if available.', '- Fill payload keys to match that template\'s fields.', '- Keep text concise and social-media ready.'].join('\n'); })() }}
